metadata.title: AI Comic Generator - Create Comic Dialogue & Panel Scripts
metadata.description: AI Comic Generator: create panel-by-panel scripts with dialogue and narration from any story idea. Free tool for manga and webtoon creators.
metadata.keywords: AI Comic Generator, comic dialogue generator, comic script generator, AI comic script generator, manga script generator, webtoon script generator, comic panel script generator, AI comic writer, comic narration generator, text-based AI comic generator

ui.title: AI Comic Generator
ui.subtitle: Create comic dialogue, narration, and panel-by-panel scripts from any story idea.
ui.story_prompt_placeholder: Describe the scene, conflict, or comic moment you want to generate... (e.g., 'Two rivals meet unexpectedly on a rooftop during a storm')
ui.setting_placeholder: e.g., Rainy rooftop at midnight, school hallway, ruined city street
ui.scene_goal_placeholder: e.g., Reveal a secret, start a conflict, land a punchline, end with a cliffhanger
ui.output_empty: Your panel-by-panel comic script will appear here. Enter your story idea and click Generate!

validation.enter_prompt: Please enter a story idea or scene.
validation.add_characters: Please add at least 2 characters with names.

errors.generation_failed: Failed to generate comic script. Please try again.

random_prompts: Two classmates are trapped in a classroom after school and discover a hidden message under a desk.
A rookie hero confronts a retired villain on a train platform during a citywide blackout.
A comedic four-panel scene about an overconfident wizard whose spell goes completely wrong.
Two siblings argue over a family heirloom while a storm destroys the village outside.
A webtoon-style confession scene where one character reveals a secret just as the elevator doors open.
A space captain must negotiate with an alien ambassador who only communicates through riddles.

output.empty_message: Your panel-by-panel comic script will appear here.

feature_intro.name: feature_intro
feature_intro.label: Overview
feature_intro.title: What Is an AI Comic Generator?
feature_intro.description: An AI Comic Generator is a writing tool that helps you turn ideas into comic-style scenes, character dialogue, narration, and structured panel scripts. Instead of generating images, our AI Comic Generator focuses on the story side of comic creation, helping writers, manga creators, and webtoon storytellers plan scenes, craft dialogue, and organize panel flow before illustration begins.

image.alt: What is an AI Comic Generator

items.title: Dialogue-First Comic Writing
items.description: Generate comic dialogue that feels natural, emotionally resonant, and well-suited to the pace of visual storytelling.

items.title: Panel-by-Panel Structure
items.description: Turn a rough scene idea into a clean panel breakdown with action descriptions, narration, and speaker lines organized per panel.

items.title: Built for Storytellers
items.description: Shape manga, webtoon, and comic strip scenes around character voice, pacing, and emotional beats, not just raw dialogue.

feature_benefits.name: feature_benefits
feature_benefits.label: Benefits
feature_benefits.title: Why Use Our AI Comic Generator
feature_benefits.description: Designed for creators who need faster comic writing without losing story quality, character voice, or visual pacing.

items.title: Create Comic Scripts Faster
items.description: Move from raw idea to a comic-ready draft in minutes, with dialogue, captions, and panel structure already organized for you.

items.title: Keep Character Voices Consistent
items.description: Define character personalities and roles so every spoken line sounds distinct and in-character across all panels.

items.title: Plan Panels More Clearly
items.description: Use structured panel-by-panel output to make your comic scenes easier to revise, storyboard, or hand off to artists.

faq_section.name: faq
faq_section.label: FAQ
faq_section.title: AI Comic Generator FAQs
faq_section.description: Common questions about our AI Comic Generator, outputs, and creative workflow.

items.title: What is an AI Comic Generator?
items.description: An AI Comic Generator is a tool that turns your story ideas into comic-style content. Our AI Comic Generator focuses on text output: comic dialogue, narration, and panel-by-panel scripts, for writers and storytellers who need structured creative output.

items.title: Does this AI Comic Generator create comic images?
items.description: No. This AI Comic Generator is designed for writing comic dialogue, captions, and structured scripts rather than generating images. It helps you plan and write comic scenes before illustration or storyboarding.

items.title: Can I use this AI Comic Generator for manga and webtoons?
items.description: Yes. You can select manga, webtoon, or other styles when generating your script. The AI will adapt the panel structure, pacing, and dialogue tone to match your chosen format.

items.title: Can the AI Comic Generator create panel-by-panel scripts?
items.description: Yes. Our AI Comic Generator organizes your scene into a panel-by-panel structure with action descriptions, character dialogue, and narration captions, making it easy to visualize and produce.

items.title: Can I control the tone and dialogue style?
items.description: Yes. You can guide the AI Comic Generator with character personalities, scene tone, narration style, and a scene goal to shape the dialogue and pacing to your story's needs.

items.title: Who should use this AI Comic Generator?
items.description: This AI Comic Generator is ideal for comic writers, manga creators, webtoon authors, novelists adapting scenes, and anyone who wants to turn story ideas into structured, panel-ready comic scripts.

items.title: Can I use the generated comic scripts commercially?
items.description: Yes. You can edit and use the scripts created by the AI Comic Generator in your own creative projects, including commercial comics, manga, and webtoon work.

items.title: How do I get better results from the AI Comic Generator?
items.description: Provide a clear scene idea, define at least two characters with personalities and roles, add a setting, and choose a scene goal. The more context you give, the stronger the script and dialogue will be.

cta_section.name: cta
cta_section.title: Turn Your Story Idea into a Comic Script Now
cta_section.description: Use our AI Comic Generator to create dialogue, narration, and panel-ready scripts for manga, webtoons, and comic storytelling.

how_to_use.name: how_to_use
how_to_use.label: HOW TO USE
how_to_use.title: How to Use the AI Comic Generator
how_to_use.description: Generate a complete panel-by-panel comic script in just three steps.

items.title: Describe Your Scene
items.description: Enter your story idea, key conflict, or scene mood. You can also click the random inspiration button to get started quickly.

items.title: Set Comic Parameters
items.description: Choose your comic style, panel count, story tone, and add character details and advanced options to customize your script.

items.title: Generate and Refine
items.description: Hit the generate button and the AI will create a panel-by-panel comic script. Copy the result or adjust parameters to regenerate.
